title: Danaher Remains Stable And Better Than Its Pre-Pandemic Level
text: Danaher posted a temporary weakness on its topline growth which snowballed to its margins. It enjoys opportunities outside the pandemic which will support its topline growth.

title: Buy 'gift horse' Danaher while it's down but leave room for other stocks, Cramer says
text: "Danaher is a gift horse down here. Don't look it in the mouth, just take it," the "Mad Money" host said Friday.

title: Will Danaher reverse the trend of the declining share price after Q1 results?
text: Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) had several weeks of downward pressure on the price. The stock appears to have consolidated in the range between $262 and $297.

title: All You Need to Know About Danaher (DHR) Rating Upgrade to Buy
text: Danaher (DHR) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

title: Danaher gets lift from Covid testing, but core business is also humming

title: Danaher Corporation (DHR) CEO Rainer Blair on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 21, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants John Bedford - Vice President, Investor Relations Rainer Blair - President and Chief Executive Officer Matt McGrew - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Derik De Bruin - Bank of America Vijay Kumar - Evercore ISI Scott Davis - Melius Research Dan Brennan - Cowen Jack Meehan - Nephron Research Patrick Donnelly - Citi Luke Sergott - Barclays Operator Good day. title: Danaher (DHR) Tops Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Danaher (DHR) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 4.15% and 1.88%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Danaher Reports First Quarter 2022 Results
text: WASHINGTON , April 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR) (the "Company") today announced results for the first quarter 2022. For the quarter ended April 1, 2022, net earnings were $1.7 billion, or $2.31 per diluted common share which represents a 1.0% increase over the comparable 2021 period.

title: Q1 Scorecard and Analyst Reports for UnitedHealth, Danaher & Wells Fargo
text: Today's Research Daily features Q1 earnings season scorecard and fresh reports on UnitedHealth(UNH), Danaher (DHR), Wells Fargo (WFC) & others.

title: Danaher Announces Conversion Date For Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock
text: WASHINGTON , April 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Danaher Corporation (NYSE: DHR) announced today that its 4.75% Series A Mandatory Convertible Preferred Stock (the "Preferred Stock"), will automatically convert into shares of the Company's Common Stock on April 15, 2022 (the "Conversion Date"). The conversion rate for each share of Preferred Stock will be 6.6632 shares of the Company's Common Stock.

title: Danaher Corporation's price rally nears a stop. Should you sell now?
text: Danaher Corporation (NYSE:DHR) has been a stock to watch since the pandemic broke out. The company which manufactures diagnostic consumables recorded growth in revenue during the pandemic.

title: 4 Stocks With a History of Operating Income Margin Growth
